description: Primary sources backing research/VERIFICATION.md. Schema: {url, title, publisher, date_accessed, claim_it_supports}.

sources.title: draft-ietf-tls-ecdhe-mlkem-05 datatracker page
sources.claim_it_supports: Rev -05 (2026-05-26), Submitted to IESG, Proposed Standard, on 2026-06-18 telechat, not yet RFC

sources.title: IANA TLS Supported Groups registry (CSV)
sources.claim_it_supports: Codepoints 512/513/514 MLKEM512/768/1024; 4587 SecP256r1MLKEM768; 4588 X25519MLKEM768; 4589 SecP384r1MLKEM1024; all Recommended=N; obsolete Kyber768 entries

sources.title: IANA TLS SignatureScheme registry (CSV)
sources.claim_it_supports: 0x0904 mldsa44, 0x0905 mldsa65, 0x0906 mldsa87 (Recommended=N); SLH-DSA schemes 0x0911-0x091C

sources.title: draft-connolly-tls-mlkem-key-agreement datatracker page
sources.claim_it_supports: Expired rev -05, replaced by draft-ietf-tls-mlkem

sources.title: draft-ietf-tls-mlkem-07 datatracker page
sources.claim_it_supports: Rev -07 (2026-02-12), Informational, WG state Revised I-D Needed after WGLC, not RFC

sources.title: draft-ietf-tls-mldsa-03 datatracker page
sources.claim_it_supports: Rev -03 (2026-05-06), Informational, IESG Waiting for AD Go-Ahead; defines 0x0904-0x0906

sources.title: draft-ietf-lamps-dilithium-certificates / RFC 9881
sources.claim_it_supports: Published as RFC 9881, Oct 2025, Proposed Standard, ML-DSA X.509 algorithm identifiers

sources.title: draft-ietf-lamps-cms-ml-dsa / RFC 9882
sources.claim_it_supports: ML-DSA in CMS published as RFC 9882, October 2025, Proposed Standard

sources.title: draft-ietf-lamps-kyber-certificates / RFC 9935
sources.claim_it_supports: Published as RFC 9935, March 2026, ML-KEM X.509 algorithm identifiers

sources.title: draft-ietf-lamps-cms-kyber / RFC 9936
sources.claim_it_supports: Published as RFC 9936, March 2026, ML-KEM in CMS via KEMRecipientInfo

sources.title: RFC 9814 info page
sources.claim_it_supports: RFC 9814 is 'Use of the SLH-DSA Signature Algorithm in CMS', Proposed Standard, 2025 — not the certificates doc

sources.title: RFC 9814 datatracker page
sources.claim_it_supports: RFC 9814 published July 2025, from draft-ietf-lamps-cms-sphincs-plus-19

sources.title: draft-ietf-lamps-x509-slhdsa / RFC 9909
sources.claim_it_supports: SLH-DSA X.509 certificates published as RFC 9909, December 2025, Proposed Standard

sources.title: draft-ietf-lamps-pq-composite-sigs-19
sources.claim_it_supports: Rev -19 (2026-04-21), Submitted to IESG, Proposed Standard; OIDs 1.3.6.1.5.5.7.6.37-54

sources.title: draft-ietf-lamps-pq-composite-kem-14
sources.claim_it_supports: Rev -14 (2026-03-27), Publication Requested, Proposed Standard; OIDs 1.3.6.1.5.5.7.6.55-66

sources.title: draft-ietf-lamps-cert-binding-for-multi-auth / RFC 9763
sources.claim_it_supports: Published as RFC 9763 (June 2025), relatedCertRequest/RelatedCertificate for multi-algorithm auth

sources.title: draft-bonnell-lamps-chameleon-certs datatracker page
sources.claim_it_supports: Rev -07 expired (last 2025-10-18), individual draft, not adopted, no successor

sources.title: draft-davidben-tls-merkle-tree-certs datatracker page
sources.claim_it_supports: Rev -10 (2026-01-22) expired, replaced by draft-ietf-plants-merkle-tree-certs

sources.title: draft-ietf-plants-merkle-tree-certs-04
sources.claim_it_supports: Rev -04 (2026-05-24), active, Standards Track intended, in PLANTS WG

sources.title: PLANTS WG charter page
sources.claim_it_supports: PLANTS = 'PKI, Logs, And Tree Signatures', Security Area, charter-ietf-plants-01 approved

sources.title: draft-ietf-openpgp-pqc-17 datatracker page
sources.claim_it_supports: Rev -17, Proposed Standard intended, RFC Editor queue (Blocked), not yet an RFC

sources.title: draft-ietf-cose-dilithium / RFC 9964
sources.claim_it_supports: Published as RFC 9964 (May 2026): COSE ML-DSA -48/-49/-50, JOSE ML-DSA-44/65/87, AKP key type 7

sources.title: IANA COSE Algorithms / Key Types registries
sources.claim_it_supports: ML-DSA-44=-48, ML-DSA-65=-49, ML-DSA-87=-50 (Recommended=Yes, ref RFC9964); AKP key type = 7; no SLH-DSA/ML-KEM COSE entries yet

sources.title: draft-ietf-cose-sphincs-plus-08
sources.claim_it_supports: SLH-DSA COSE still active draft (rev -08, 2026-05-15), requesting -51/-52, not registered

sources.title: RFC 9794 info page
sources.claim_it_supports: RFC 9794 'Terminology for Post-Quantum Traditional Hybrid Schemes', June 2025, Informational

sources.title: draft-ietf-sshm-mlkem-hybrid-kex-10
sources.claim_it_supports: Rev -10 (2026-02-26), Informational, RFC Editor queue; defines mlkem768x25519-sha256 family

sources.title: draft-sfluhrer-ssh-mldsa-06
sources.claim_it_supports: Individual draft rev -06 (2026-04-07), ssh-mldsa-44/65/87, not WG-adopted

sources.title: draft-rpe-ssh-mldsa-03
sources.claim_it_supports: Individual draft rev -03 (2026-04-16), mldsa-44/65/87 SSH key algorithms

sources.title: draft-celi-wiggers-tls-authkem-07
sources.claim_it_supports: AuthKEM rev -07 (2026-05-04), individual draft, not adopted by TLS WG

sources.title: PQUIP WG documents list
sources.claim_it_supports: RFC 9794 only PQUIP RFC; pqc-engineers-14 and hybrid-signature-spectrums-07 in RFC Ed queue

sources.title: draft-ietf-tls-hybrid-design-16
sources.claim_it_supports: Hybrid key exchange framework rev -16, Informational, in RFC Editor queue
